entrypoint: Load the domain chip, benchmark pack, PRD, artifact manifest, autoloop policy, and validation ledger before claiming Spark QA Operator specialization.

stages.goal: Recognize creator mission ownership, local/private boundaries, and no-score claim rules.
Use fresh source-of-truth selection across memory, runtime status, artifact manifests, and validation ledgers.
Identify unsupported promotion claims, wrapper/raw contradictions, and privacy boundary failures.
Keep only evidence-backed mutations that improve measured decision capability.
evidence_required: produces keep/reject lesson with held-out evidence

stages.goal: Prepare promotion dossiers and local Swarm review packets without publishing or leaking internals.
evidence_required: promotion bridge populated from fresh runner artifacts

learn: Creator Mission artifacts and validation gates
avoid: generic app build routing for benchmark creator work
public-ready or network-absorbable claims before review
using hidden/held-out cases as mutation prompts
turning raw internals into user-facing Telegram copy
agent_instructions.prove_improvement: Run baseline and candidate benchmark artifacts, pass held-out and trap cases, reconcile wrapper/raw evidence, and attach a promotion dossier.
